full_description: Walk Tracker is a fitness app designed to help you track your daily steps, distance, and calories burned. It provides motivation and rewards for achieving your fitness goals. With Walk Tracker, you can set daily step targets and monitor your progress. The app also offers personalized recommendations to help you stay on track and reach new milestones. Features include: step tracking, distance tracking, calorie burn tracking, customizable goals, and rewards for milestones achieved. Whether you're looking to improve your overall health or train for a specific event, Walk Tracker is the perfect companion to help you reach your fitness goals.
